title: Sulfur Cube: Combinations
description: Combine two absorbed blocks and inherit both behaviors.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b418363bbb059093ca402bfa793ca83f7b40a114.png)

Sulfur Cube: Combinations expands Sulfur Cubes with a new combination system. Instead of being limited to one absorbed block, a Sulfur Cube can now hold two different blocks at once, creating new mixed properties and special interactions.

# Interactions
Players can place, replace and remove each side of the Sulfur Cube separately. This makes combinations easy to control. Duplicate blocks are ignored, so the same block cannot be used twice to stack the same effect.
## Same Attributes
Combining blocks with the same attribute _(like Oak Planks with Spruce Planks)_ creates a stronger version of that attribute.
## Different Attributes
Different attributes _(like Stone with Wood)_ are blended into one shared result.
## Shared Abilities
Special abilities from both blocks _(like TNT, Magma Block, ...)_ can work together.
